title: Blink Charging Co. Financial Results - Investor Relations
text: Blink Charging Co. investor relations financial results page provides quarterly and annual financial statements. Q1 2026: Revenue $20.78M (flat YoY), Service revenue $13.3M (+25% YoY). Q4 2025: Revenue $27.0M (-3.5% YoY), Service revenue $14.7M (+62% YoY). Full Year 2025: Revenue $103.5M, Service revenue $49.3M (+44.7% YoY). Q4 2024: Revenue $30.2M (+20% sequential), Service revenue $9.8M (+24% YoY). Full Year 2024: Revenue $126.2M, Service revenue $34.8M (+31.8% YoY). Full Year 2023: Revenue $140.6M (+130% YoY), Service revenue $7.9M-$34.8M range across quarters. Company operating expenses fell 54% in 2025 versus 2024. Cash position at end of Q1 2026 was $38M with zero debt. Gross margins improved to approximately 35% in 2026 versus 32% in 2024.
